task: Polish the Acme marketing site: copy, pricing, install snippet, CTA

changes.title: Read the API key from an env var, not a literal
changes.description: The install snippet now reads ACME_KEY from the environment instead of hardcoding it.

changes.title: Make the primary CTA teal and pill-shaped
changes.description: The .cta button got the brand teal background and a 9px radius.

anchor.hint: the green ‘Get started free’ button — confirm it’s teal, rounded, and readable

changes.title: Rewrite the mission sentence
changes.before: Our goal is to make changes fast.
changes.after: Our mission is to make every UI change reviewable in seconds.

anchor.value: make every UI change reviewable in seconds
